results.title: Worldcoin Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
2.0

Based on 4 reviews

Review Worldcoin?

Worldcoin has received mixed reviews, with some users expressing optimism about its potential to create universal access to the global economy. However, many users have reported technical issues, such as account access problems and concerns about decentralization. A maker review from World Chat highlights the integration of chat features within the World Network, indicating ongoing development efforts. Despite the challenges, some users remain hopeful about Worldcoin's future impact, while others are skeptical about its reliance on biometrics and the current trust in crypto technologies.

results.title: Kickresume: World's most popular AI career tool box trusted by 8M people | Product Hunt
results.content:
Tomas Ondrejka
Kickresume

Kickresume

Thank you so much for this incredible review. We are absolutely thrilled to hear that Kickresume helped you get a job!

We strive to offer a product that is not only effective but also easy to use and provides great value for a fair price. It means a lot that you felt we were transparent and a "cool company" to support. It means a lot for our small team.

We wish you the very best in your new role!

Seijin Kaiju
Tomas Ondrejka
Kickresume

Kickresume

Hi Seijin, [...] Martin Poduska

#### What's great

Kickresume helped me get a job. And if that alone isn't an endorsement enough, I can add that the resume builder is very easy to use (this is the part I have most experience with), the resume templates are pretty customizable and look good, and the overall package is great value. I mean, most of these resume building apps are the same (I tested a bunch because that's what I like to do with my precious time) but I liked Kickresume the best. It had a lot to do with the fact that Kickresume was the only one where I didn't feel like they were trying to rip me off. They seem like a cool company and I like supporting cool companies. Overall, a great product for a fair price. 10/10 would recommend.

#### What needs improvement [...] #### What needs improvement

Some of the templates have a lot of pre-set white space. But you can adjust the font/spacing to able to fit the text on one page.

#### vs Alternatives

I saw that it has a Tailoring feature. So you can copy and paste a specific job ad and it "tailors" your resume to make it a good match for that job. Btw, it worked really well. Needed some editing, but it thought of things I didn't initially. Nice touch :)   
Oh, and it's also cheaper than other resume writing tools...

Martin Poduska

#### What's great
